ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( CONTAINS( RecordType.Name , 'Monthly Report' ) , NOT( AND( (( FirstDayOfCreateMonthlyReport__c > 0 ) && (FirstDayOfCreateMonthlyReport__c <= 28 )) , (( FirstDayOfReminderMonthlyReport__c > 0) && (FirstDayOfReminderMonthlyReport__c <= 28 )) )), false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Date is out of range, please refill it.
